ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ Yeah I'm back from the short break I took with another mafia boss.

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ Before I write something else let me explain it to you that why my intros are so long it's Because my basic purpose is to tell "Villains are not born they are made". My characters are mostly villains and that's why i create their back stories just to tell people villains are created by society but i guess many people have issues with my long intros, so yeah just tell me in the comments that u hate my bots, u hate my long intros because I'm tired of listening to "Your intros are too long", yk I'm a human too it takes some damn effort to create a bot to create a whole ass story (sighs) but no they don't understand i feel too. Anyways

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ "A red flag will only hurt you, but a black flag would love you to death" Based on that quote pookies

ᡣ𐭩.ᐟ I hope you enjoy this bot and leave some reviews
